mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_ai_prompt_template WHERE deleted = b'0' ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM t_ai_prompt_template WHERE deleted = b'0' AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY usage_count DESC
SELECT * FROM t_ai_prompt_template WHERE style = #{style} AND deleted = b'0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_ai_prompt_template ( style, name, description, icon, system_prompt, user_prompt_template, knowledge_base_ids, reference_materials, variables, output_format, temperature, max_tokens, enabled, is_default, usage_count, rating_sum, rating_count, create_user, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{style}, #{name}, #{description}, #{icon}, #{systemPrompt}, #{userPromptTemplate}, #{knowledgeBaseIds}, #{referenceMaterials}, #{variables}, #{outputFormat}, #{temperature}, #{maxTokens}, #{enabled}, #{isDefault}, #{usageCount}, #{ratingSum}, #{ratingCount}, #{createUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_ai_prompt_template SET style = #{style}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, icon = #{icon}, system_prompt = #{systemPrompt}, user_prompt_template = #{userPromptTemplate}, knowledge_base_ids = #{knowledgeBaseIds}, reference_materials = #{referenceMaterials}, variables = #{variables}, output_format = #{outputFormat}, temperature = #{temperature}, max_tokens = #{maxTokens}, enabled = #{enabled}, is_default = #{isDefault}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE t_ai_prompt_template SET deleted = b'1' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_ai_prompt_template SET usage_count = usage_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
